name: Jackett
description: API support for your favorite torrent trackers
compose:
name: slashnode-jackett
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/jackett:0.24.2122
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9117:9117
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-jackett_server_data
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-jackett_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (jackett). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://github.com/Jackett/Jackett/.
